title: Trump's antitrust cops are OK with new mergers. Old tech monopolies, not so much. President Trump's antitrust cops are so far friendlier about mergers than their predecessors, but they are refusing to let up on one prominent priority of the Biden administration: monopoly prosecutions of the nation's best-known tech giants.

D2E Labs Appoints Wayfair Exec Karan Raturi as Chief Operating Officer to Drive Marketplace Growth of Amazon Agencies D2E Labs, a private equity–backed platform specializing in scaling performance-driven marketplace services, has appointed Karan Raturi as Chief Operating Officer. In this role, Karan will oversee operations across the D2E Labs group, including Market Defense, a full-service marketplace agency for beauty and prestige brands, and Lunge Marketing, a high-impact Amazon and performance marketing agency in the Lifestyle and Home categories.
